pages.text: A pact for cursed bearers who value gain above restraint.$(br2)It improves fortune, affects piglins, increases rewards, and helps with trading.
pages.title: Pact of Infinite Avarice

pages.text: With sufficient curses, material gains can be doubled.$(br2)Killed creatures may drop emeralds, and villagers may offer better prices.
pages.title: Greed
